title: Ensure schnorr48.c + Rust lichen-core fully implements constant-time MUST from draft-lichen-schnorr-00.md:5.3
description: Spec: 'Implementations MUST use constant-time operations for: Scalar multiplication, Signature comparison'. Verify in frame signing (lichen_link_tx.c:124, schnorr48_verify_frame:469 crypto_verify16) and batch support. No violation found but audit required post-recent link changes.
notes: Commit: f474bd33f - audit confirms full constant-time compliance in schnorr48.c:468 (crypto_verify16), lichen_link_tx.c:128 (sign_frame), Rust schnorr.rs:144 (ct_eq), Monocypher/Dalek libs; no changes needed post-vu0r alignment; batch support via spec 5.4 remains optional
close_reason: Audit complete: full CT compliance confirmed in C/Rust implementations for scalar mult and sig comparison per draft-lichen-schnorr-00.md:5.3. No code changes required. Tests and vectors pass.
